desc.en: Understand how OpenEnlarge inverts film scans through real density-domain chemistry, and what every tool does.
desc.zh: 了解 OpenEnlarge 如何通过真实的密度域化学原理反转胶片扫描，以及每个工具的作用。

desc.en: Import, Develop, Tune, Roll and Export — how a roll moves through OpenEnlarge.
desc.zh: 导入、显影、微调、整卷与导出 —— 一卷胶片在 OpenEnlarge 中的流转方式。

desc.en: The orange mask, the three dye layers, and the Hurter–Driffield curve that turn light into density on film.
desc.zh: 橙色片基、三层染料，以及将光转化为胶片密度的 Hurter–Driffield 特性曲线。

desc.en: From scanned negative to finished positive, stage by stage: base removal, log density, balance, tone, look, display.
desc.zh: 从扫描负片到成品正片，逐级拆解：去除片基、对数密度、平衡、色调、风格、显示编码。

desc.en: Why OpenEnlarge works in optical density and log space, what a photographic stop is, and how the d_max white point is set.
desc.zh: 为什么 OpenEnlarge 在光学密度与对数空间中运算、什么是摄影档，以及 d_max 白点如何确定。

desc.en: How OpenEnlarge reconstructs a positive with a gamma-plus-shoulder curve that gives true whites, soft highlights, and consistent tone across a roll.
desc.zh: OpenEnlarge 如何用「伽马 + 肩部」曲线重建正片，带来纯净的白、柔和的高光，以及整卷一致的色调。

desc.en: Gray-world auto white balance, Temperature and Tint, gain versus a subtractive color head, and perceptual OKLab saturation.
desc.zh: 灰世界自动白平衡、色温与色调、增益模式与减色「彩色头」，以及基于 OKLab 的感知饱和度。

desc.en: How OpenEnlarge samples the orange film base per roll and sets the white point, and how to recalibrate by hand.
desc.zh: OpenEnlarge 如何按卷采样橙色片基并确定白点，以及如何手动重新校准。

desc.en: Every Basic control in Develop — what it does and the engine parameter it tunes: exposure, tone regions, white balance, texture, saturation, film profile.
desc.zh: 显影「基础」面板的每个控件 —— 它的作用，以及它在引擎中调整的参数：曝光、色调区域、白平衡、纹理、饱和度、胶片配置。

desc.en: Precise tone and color: the tone-curve editor, color-grading wheels, the 8-band color mixer, and point-color targeting — and the parameters each writes.
desc.zh: 精确的色调与色彩：色调曲线编辑器、调色色轮、八段色彩混合器与点色定位 —— 以及各自写入的参数。

desc.en: Crop, rotate, straighten and flip; plus dust and scratch removal — the manual eraser, infrared dust, and on-device AI inpainting.
desc.zh: 裁剪、旋转、校正与翻转；以及除尘除痕 —— 手动橡皮擦、红外除尘与本地 AI 修复。

desc.en: AI Enhance (via the OpenAI API), local tone matching from a reference image, and on-device super-resolution upscaling — what each does and where it runs.
desc.zh: AI 增强（通过 OpenAI API）、基于参考图的本地色调匹配，以及本地超分辨率放大 —— 各自的作用与运行位置。
